7 
8 #ifndef MW_MP4_H
9 #define MW_MP4_H
10 
11 #include <stdint.h>
12 #if !defined( _WIN32 )
13 #include <stdbool.h>
14 #endif
15 
16 #ifdef _WIN32
17 #ifdef MW_MP4_EXPORTS
18 #define MW_MP4_API __declspec(dllexport)
19 #else
20 #define MW_MP4_API __declspec(dllimport)
21 #endif
22 #else
23 #define MW_MP4_API
24 #endif
25 
26 typedef struct _mw_mp4_handle_t{int32_t r;} *mw_mp4_handle_t;
27 
28 typedef enum _mw_mp4_status
29 {
30  MW_MP4_STATUS_SUCCESS = 0,
31  MW_MP4_STATUS_UNEXPECTED_ERROR,
32  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_HANDLE,
33  MW_MP4_STATUS_FILE_NAME_TOO_LONG,
34  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_PARAMETER,
35  //MW_MP4_STATUS_OPEN_FILE_FAILED,
36  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_CODEC_TYPE,
37  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_SUBTITLE_TYPE,
38  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_ADTS_STREAM,
39  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_VIDEO_STREAM,
40  MW_MP4_STATUS_INVALID_VIDEO_TRACK,
41  MW_MP4_STATUS_UNSUPPORTED,
42  MW_MP4_STATUS_OPERATOR_NOT_PERMITTED,
43 
44  MW_MP4_STATUS_NO_SUCH_FILE_OR_DIR,
45  MW_MP4_STATUS_PERMISSION_DENIED,
46  MW_MP4_STATUS_DEVICE_OR_RESOURCE_BUSY,
47  MW_MP4_STATUS_TOO_MANY_OPEN_FILES,
48  MW_MP4_STATUS_NO_SPACE_LEFT,
49  MW_MP4_STATUS_READONLY_FILE_SYSTEM,
50 
51  MW_MP4_STATUS_EXTERNAL_FUNC_FAILED,
52  MW_MP4_STATUS_FILE_NOT_OPEN,
53  //MW_MP4_STATUS_NO_SPACE_LEFT_IN_HEADER,
54 } mw_mp4_status_t;
55 
56 typedef enum _mw_mp4_video_type {
57  MW_MP4_VIDEO_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
58  MW_MP4_VIDEO_TYPE_H264 = 1,
59  MW_MP4_VIDEO_TYPE_HEVC = 2,
60  MW_MP4_VIDEO_TYPE_H265 = MW_MP4_VIDEO_TYPE_HEVC
61 }mw_mp4_video_type_t;
62 
63 typedef struct _mw_mp4_h264_parameter_set {
64  uint8_t* sps; // can be nullptr if it's contained in the stream
65  int16_t sps_size; // can be 0 if it's contained in the stream
66  uint8_t* pps; // can be nullptr if it's contained in the stream
67  int16_t pps_size; // can be 0 if it's contained in the stream
68 } mw_mp4_h264_parameter_set_t;
69 
70 typedef struct _mw_mp4_hevc_parameter_set {
71  uint8_t* sps; // can be nullptr if it's contained in the stream
72  int16_t sps_size; // can be 0 if it's contained in the stream
73  uint8_t* pps; // can be nullptr if it's contained in the stream
74  int16_t pps_size; // can be 0 if it's contained in the stream
75  uint8_t* vps; // can be nullptr if it's contained in the stream
76  int16_t vps_size; // can be 0 if it's contained in the stream
77 } mw_mp4_hevc_parameter_set_t;
78 
79 typedef struct _mw_mp4_video_info {
80  mw_mp4_video_type_t codec_type;
81  uint32_t timescale;
82  uint16_t width;
83  uint16_t height;
84 
85  union{
86  mw_mp4_h264_parameter_set_t h264;
87  mw_mp4_hevc_parameter_set_t hevc;
88  };
89 } mw_mp4_video_info_t;
90 
91 typedef enum _mw_mp4_audio_type {
92  MW_MP4_AUDIO_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
93  MW_MP4_AUDIO_TYPE_AAC = 1,
94  MW_MP4_AUDIO_TYPE_ADTS_AAC = 2
95 }mw_mp4_audio_codec_t;
96 
97 typedef struct _mw_mp4_audio_info {
98  mw_mp4_audio_codec_t codec_type;
99  uint32_t timescale;
100  uint16_t sample_rate; // can be 0 if codec is aac with adts
101  uint16_t channels; // can be 0 if codec is aac with adts
102  uint8_t profile; // can be 0 if codec is aac with adts
103 } mw_mp4_audio_info_t;
104 
105 typedef enum _mw_mp4_subtitle_type {
106  MW_MP4_SUBTITLE_TYPE_UNKNOWN = 0,
107  MW_MP4_SUBTITLE_TYPE_CC608 = 1,
108  MW_MP4_SUBTITLE_TYPE_CC708 = 2
109 }mw_mp4_subtitle_type_t;
110 
111 typedef struct _mw_mp4_subtitle_info {
112  mw_mp4_subtitle_type_t codec_type;
113  uint32_t timescale;
114 } mw_mp4_subtitle_info_t;
115

117 extern "C"

204 mw_mp4_status_t mw_mp4_write_subtitle(mw_mp4_handle_t handle, const uint8_t * p_stream, uint32_t size, uint64_t timestamp);

213 mw_mp4_status_t mw_mp4_close(mw_mp4_handle_t handle);

223 mw_mp4_status_t mw_mp4_repair(const char * p_path, bool del);
224
